calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Gary Fertig, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness: Linda Seals was placed under oath and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Kirk C. Silverman aka Kirk Silverman ind. and dba Truck World USA. for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,927.92
Prejudgment Interest - $2,526.88
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00
Costs - $560.00
Total judgment in the amount of $39,839.80

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2011 Continued To Jan-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Oct-07-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
